senses.definition_dg: Angaliya pandza.

examples.dg: Pafu ni neno ranjina ra pandza.
examples.en: Pafu is another word for pandza.
examples.sw: Pafu ni neno lingine la pandza.

examples.dg: Likehe ni ukongo ambao unagbwira mapafu na kumhenda mutu akolole sana
examples.en: Tuberculosis is an illness which affects the lungs and makes a person cough a lot

senses.definition_dg: Chitu chidide chigumu kpwa mgulu wa nyuma wa kuku ambacho chinatumiwa kupigira.

examples.dg: Dzogoo iye ana paga kali.
examples.en: That cock has a sharp spur.
examples.sw: Jogoo yule ana kipi kali.

equivalents_en: a kind of insect like a cattle-tick but smaller which affects chickens

senses.definition_en: a kind of insect like a cattle-tick but smaller which affects chickens
senses.definition_sw: aina ya wadudu kama kupe, lakini wadogo na hushika kuku
senses.definition_dg: Mududu mdide dza kupe ambaye anagbwira kuku na kunyonya milatso yao.

examples.dg: Kuku ahu ana pahazi anji; ni lazima tuaphozere.
examples.en: Our chickens have many mites; we must treat them.
examples.sw: Kuku wetu wana wadudu wengi; lazima tuwatibu.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kukala choo chigumu, kuremewa kuphiya msalani.

examples.dg: Mwana ana pahu; muphere madzi manji.
examples.en: The child has constipation; give him plenty of water.
examples.sw: Mtoto ana choo kigumu; mpe maji mengi.

senses.definition_en: to paint, to smear, to anoint (with oil)
senses.definition_dg: Kutiya rangi au mafuha dzulu ya chitu.

examples.dg: Anapaka ukuta rangi ya nyere.
examples.en: He is painting the wall white.
examples.sw: Anapaka ukuta rangi nyeupe.

senses.definition_dg: Nguvu za mwiri, uwezo wa kuhenda kazi ngumu.

examples.dg: Mutu iye ana palata nyinji; anaweza kutsukula mizigo midzito.
examples.en: That person has great physical strength; he can carry heavy loads.
examples.sw: Mtu yule ana nguvu nyingi; anaweza kubeba mizigo mizito.

senses.definition_dg: Usingizi wa kpwa kure, usingizi mzito sana.

examples.dg: Akalala palawaga; ukimpigia kumusha kanashinda kusikira.
examples.en: He fell into a deep sleep; even if you call him he can't hear.
examples.sw: Amelala fofofo; hata ukimwamsha hasikii.

senses.definition_dg: Aina ya tunda ra mwituni.

examples.dg: Palawanda ni tunda ambaro rinapatikana tsakani.
examples.en: Palawanda is a fruit found in the bush.
examples.sw: Palawanda ni tunda linalopatikana porini.

senses.definition_dg: Kupasuka au kuvundzika kpwa nguvu.

examples.dg: Chimbuzi chirapalika kpwa sababu ya moho.
examples.en: The pot burst because of the heat.
examples.sw: Chungu kilipasuka kwa sababu ya moto.

equivalents_en: cause something to burst or break

senses.definition_en: to cause something to burst or break

examples.dg: Wapalisa nazi kpwa chisu.

examples.sw: Alipasua nazi kwa kisu.

examples.dg: Ahendadzi-kazi a Forestry Department anatiya palo mihi
examples.en: The Forestry Department workers are marking the trees

equivalents_sw: namna ya samaki ya kulika na wanadamu

senses.definition_sw: namna ya samaki ya kulika na wanadamu
senses.definition_dg: Aina ya samaki ambaye anariywa ni atu.

examples.dg: Pamamba ni samaki mtamu wa baharini.
examples.en: Pamamba is a tasty sea fish.

examples.dg: Achetu apamba nyumba ya arusi.

examples.dg: Liverpool na Newcastle zindapambana muhondo

examples.dg: Unaphotaka kuusa shida hizi, ni lazima upambane nazo

examples.dg: Mapambo ga arusi ni manono sana.

equivalents_en: reddish ant that lives on trees

examples.dg: Usigbwire muhi uhu; una mapambo manji.

examples.dg: Rais anahendato, kpwa hivyo ana pamvu
examples.en: The President is doing well, so he is popular

examples.dg: Mubaraka ana panda ya kupigira nyuni.
examples.en: The young man has a catapult for shooting birds.
examples.sw: Kijana ana manati ya kupigila ndege.

equivalents_en: climb e.g. a tree or mountain

senses.definition_dg: Kuphiya dzulu ya muhi, mwango, au chitu chire.

examples.dg: Mwana wapanda muhini.

examples.dg: Pandza anarira muhini kure.

examples.dg: Panga vitu vyako vinono kabla ya kutsama.

equivalents_sw: normally used in relation to houses; kupangisha

examples.en: The papaya has ripened well; let's take it and eat.

examples.sw: Watu wanajenga paa la nyumba ya mzee.

examples.en: The sick person is babbling; he is not speaking sensibly.
examples.sw: Mgonjwa anapayuka; hasemi maneno ya akili.

senses.definition_dg: Kumrema mutu na kumsahau, kumuonera.

examples.dg: Usipaze mutu ariyekuterya.
examples.en: Don't ignore the person who helped you.

senses.definition_dg: Kusaga nafaka kidogo ili ngozi zake zitoke.

examples.dg: Wapaza kunde ili kutoa ngozi.

examples.en: My heel hurts after walking a lot.

examples.dg: Wavwala paziya nono drishani.

examples.sw: Alitundika pazia zuri dirishani.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kukala chitu chimwenga tu, chisichoigana na chanjina.

examples.dg: Mutu chila mmwenga ana pekee yakpwe.
examples.en: Every person has their own uniqueness.

senses.definition_en: to turn over, to bring down

examples.dg: Phepho rinapekula minazi

examples.en: That person is a hypocrite; don't trust him.
examples.sw: Mtu yule ni mnafiki; usimwamini.

senses.definition_dg: Kuchunguza mambo ga siri kpwa kufwitika.

examples.dg: Askari anapeleleza mambo ga mwivi.

senses.definition_dg: Labuda, ikiwezekana.

examples.dg: Pengine hundakutana muhondo.

senses.definition_dg: Hela ndide, sarafu.

examples.dg: Sina mapeni
examples.en: I don't have any small change

senses.definition_dg: Nguvu za mwiri, uwezo wa kuhenda kazi.

examples.dg: Mutu iye ana pephe nyinji; anaweza kuhenda kazi ngumu.
examples.en: That person has great physical ability; he can do hard work.
examples.sw: Mtu yule ana uwezo mwingi wa kimwili; anaweza kufanya kazi ngumu.

equivalents_en: evil spirit: general term used for spirits (not of people) which bring trouble
equivalents_sw: these are of five basic types depending on their origin and the language they speak during kayamba ceremonies: Digo (local

senses.definition_en: evil spirit: general term used for spirits (not of people) which bring trouble
senses.definition_sw: these are of five basic types depending on their origin and the language they speak during kayamba ceremonies: Digo (local, often benevolent), Swahili (coastal and malevolent), Upcountry or Bara (from the hinterland, malevolent), Arabic (from across the ocean, can be good but often malevolent), and European (from Europe, dangerous); pepo
senses.definition_dg: Pepo mbii ambayo inatukanisha mutu na kumrehera mateso. Kuna aina tano za pepo: za Chidigo, za Chiswahili, za Kibara, za Chiarabu, na za Kizungu.

examples.dg: Mutu iye anagbwirwa ni pepho; ni lazima ahenderwe kayamba.
examples.en: That person is affected by an evil spirit; a kayamba ceremony must be done for him.
examples.sw: Mtu yule anashikwa na pepo; lazima afanyiwe kayamba.

examples.dg: Mutu iye anagbwirwa ni pepho; ni lazima ahenderwe kayamba.
examples.en: That person is affected by an evil spirit; a kayamba ceremony must be done for him.
examples.sw: Mtu yule anashikwa na pepo; lazima afanyiwe kayamba.

examples.dg: Wavwala pete ya arusi chalani.
examples.en: He wore a wedding ring on his finger.
examples.sw: Alivaa pete ya arusi kidoleni.

senses.definition_dg: Kugaluka na kukala kpwa uphande munjina.

examples.dg: Gari riphetuka na kuanguka barabarani.
examples.en: The car rolled over and fell on the road.
examples.sw: Gari lilipinduka na kuanguka barabarani.

senses.definition_dg: Neno rinaonyesa rangi nyiru kabisa, bila muanga wowosi.

examples.dg: Dzuwa richigaluka rangi richikala dziru pi-pi-pi dza makala
examples.en: The sun changed colour and became jet black like charcoal
examples.sw: Jua lilipobadilika rangi likawa jeusi tititi kama makaa.

senses.definition_dg: Chitu chinachoonyesha sura ya mutu au chitu, mpiga picha.

examples.dg: Picha ya baba i dzulu ya ukuta.
examples.en: Father's picture is on the wall.
examples.sw: Picha ya baba iko juu ya ukuta.

senses.definition_en: to hit, to carry out an action (used in verb phrases, such as kupiga simu
senses.definition_dg: Kugonga chitu kpwa nguvu. Piya inatumiwa na maneno ganjina, dza kupiga simu.

examples.dg: Usimpige mwanao; muonye kpwa maneno.
examples.en: Don't hit your child; advise him with words.
examples.sw: Usimpige mtoto wako; monya kwa maneno.

senses.definition_dg: Atu airi au zaidi kupigana kpwa nguvu.

examples.dg: Avulana airi anapigana kondeni.
examples.en: Two boys are fighting in the field.
examples.sw: Vijana wawili wanapigana uwanjani.

equivalents_en: add mud to walls that have already been plastered with mud

senses.definition_en: to add mud to walls that have already been plastered with mud
senses.definition_dg: Kutiya udongo tsona kpwa ukuta ambao ukala ukapakwa kare.

examples.dg: Wapigiliya ukuta ambao ukala ukavundzika.
examples.en: He added mud to the wall that had cracked.
examples.sw: Alipigilia ukuta uliokuwa umepasuka.

equivalents_en: measure from hand to hand with arms spread

senses.definition_en: measure from hand to hand with arms spread, approximately 2
senses.definition_dg: Upimo wa mikono miiri ikanyooshwa — takriban mita mbiri.

examples.dg: Nguwo iyo ina pima mbiri za ure.
examples.en: That cloth is two arm spans long.
examples.sw: Nguo hiyo ina pima mbili za urefu.

senses.definition_dg: Upimo wa mikono miiri ikanyooshwa — takriban mita mbiri.

examples.dg: Nguwo iyo ina pima mbiri za ure.
examples.en: That cloth is two arm spans long.
examples.sw: Nguo hiyo ina pima mbili za urefu.

senses.definition_dg: Kuangaliya upimo wa chitu, dza uzito au ure.

examples.dg: Pima uzito wa mfuko uhu.
examples.en: Measure the weight of this bag.
examples.sw: Pima uzito wa mfuko huu.

senses.definition_en: graduation mark in sugarcane, about 6 inches or 15 cm
senses.definition_dg: Alama ya kuganywa kpwa muwa, takriban sentimita 15.

examples.dg: Nipha pindi sita za muwa
examples.en: Give me a piece of sugarcane six sections long (about 1 metre)
examples.sw: Nipe pindi sita za muwa.

senses.definition_en: hem, edge, border of a garment
senses.definition_dg: Mpaka au upindo wa nguo, sehemu ya mwisho iliyopindwa.

examples.dg: Pindo ra nguo iyo ni nono.
examples.en: The hem of that garment is nice.
examples.sw: Pindo la nguo hiyo ni zuri.

senses.definition_dg: Kuruka na kugaluka hewa hadi chitswa chiangaliye tsini.

examples.dg: Mwana anapiga pindu kondeni.
examples.en: The child is doing somersaults in the field.
examples.sw: Mtoto anapiga pindu uwanjani.

senses.definition_dg: Kubadilika kwa nguvu kwa utawala au hali ya tsi.

examples.dg: Pinduzi ra mwaka wa 1964 rikabadilisha tsi.
examples.en: The revolution of 1964 changed the country.
examples.sw: Mapinduzi ya mwaka wa 1964 yalibadilisha nchi.

senses.definition_dg: Kukahala na kupigana na chitu au mutu.

examples.dg: Atu anapinga sheria iyo.
examples.en: People are opposing that law.
examples.sw: Watu wanapinga sheria hiyo.

senses.definition_dg: Kuzungulusha chitu chidundu ardhini.

examples.dg: Mpira unapingilika madzini
examples.en: The ball is rolling into the water
examples.sw: Mpira unapinduka majini.

senses.definition_dg: Kuhenda chitu chizungulushe ardhini.

examples.dg: Mwana anapingilisa mpira barabarani.
examples.en: The child is rolling the ball on the road.
examples.sw: Mtoto anavingirisha mpira barabarani.

equivalents_en: charm tied on neck or arm

senses.definition_en: charm tied on neck or arm
senses.definition_dg: Hirizi inayofungbwa shingoni au mkononi kpwa kudzirinda.

examples.dg: Mwana wavwalishwa pingu shingoni.
examples.en: The child was given a charm to wear on his neck.
examples.sw: Mtoto alivishwa hirizi shingoni.

senses.definition_dg: Vitu vya chuma vya kufungira mikono ya mwivi au muhalifu.

examples.dg: Askari wamtiya pingu mwivi.
examples.en: The police put handcuffs on the thief.
examples.sw: Askari alimtia pingu mwizi.

senses.definition_dg: Chombo kikulu cha chuma cha kuikira madzi au mafuha.

examples.dg: Pipa ra madzi ri kondze ya nyumba.
examples.en: The water barrel is outside the house.
examples.sw: Pipa la maji liko nje ya nyumba.

equivalents_en: fee paid to the elders during a funeral
equivalents_sw: ada ya wazee wakati wa msiba

senses.definition_en: fee paid to the elders during a funeral
senses.definition_sw: ada ya wazee wakati wa msiba
senses.definition_dg: Hela ambayo inaliphwa azee wakati wa msiba au mazishi.

examples.dg: Azee ariphiwa pipa yao wakati wa mazishi.
examples.en: The elders were paid their fee during the funeral.
examples.sw: Wazee walilipwa ada yao wakati wa mazishi.

senses.definition_dg: Kipimo cha chizamani cha nafaka, takriban kilo tahu.

examples.dg: Gurira pishi mbiri za mahindi.
examples.en: Buy two measures of corn.
examples.sw: Nunua pishi mbili za mahindi.

senses.definition_en: wooden container used as a measure
senses.definition_dg: Chombo cha muhi ambacho chinatumiwa dza kipimo.

examples.dg: Pishi iyo ni ya kare sana.
examples.en: That wooden measure is very old.
examples.sw: Pishi hiyo ni ya zamani sana.

senses.definition_dg: Pudha ya kupakira usoni kpwa mapambo.

examples.dg: Wavwala poda usoni kabla ya kutsama.
examples.en: She put on cosmetic powder before leaving.
examples.sw: Alipaka poda usoni kabla ya kuondoka.

senses.definition_dg: Kujipamba kpwa rangi na mapambo usoni.

examples.dg: Mwari anapodowa kabla ya arusi.
examples.en: The bride is putting on make-up before the wedding.
examples.sw: Bibi arusi anapamba kabla ya arusi.

senses.definition_dg: Aina ya nafaka ndide za kijani au za kundu zinatumiwa kupika.

examples.dg: Podzo ni chakurya kitamu chinapikwa na nazi.
examples.en: Mung beans are tasty food cooked with coconut.
examples.sw: Pojo ni chakula kitamu kinachopikwa na nazi.

senses.definition_dg: Kugomba kpwa sauti ya tsini ili atu anjina asisikire.

examples.dg: Usigombe poko-poko; gomba wazi-wazi.
examples.en: Don't whisper; speak openly.
examples.sw: Usinong'one; sema wazi wazi.

senses.definition_dg: Mutu asiye na achili, mjinga.

examples.dg: Usimuihe pomboo; chila mutu ana uwezo wakpwe.
examples.en: Don't call him a fool; every person has their own ability.
examples.sw: Usimwite mjinga; kila mtu ana uwezo wake.

senses.definition_dg: Kuwa mzima bada ya ugonjwa.

examples.dg: Bada ya dawa, wapona upesi.
examples.en: After the medicine, he recovered quickly.
examples.sw: Baada ya dawa, alipona haraka.

senses.definition_en: to escape unharmed, to survive e.g. an accident
senses.definition_dg: Kutoka salama kpwa ajali au hatari.

examples.dg: Waponeshwa kpwa ajali kpwa baraka za Mlungu.
examples.en: He survived the accident by God's grace.
examples.sw: Aliokoka ajali kwa neema ya Mungu.

equivalents_en: kupiga to push a boat with a pole

senses.definition_en: , kupiga to push a boat with a pole, to punt
senses.definition_sw: kupiga pondo, kuendesha mashua kwa pondo
senses.definition_dg: Fito ra kuendesherya ngalawa au mashua kpwa kuisukuma madzini.

examples.dg: Wavigira pondo kuendesha ngalawa.
examples.en: He punted the canoe with a pole.
examples.sw: Alipiga pondo kuendesha mtumbwi.

senses.definition_dg: Mududu mdide ariye na mapha manono ga rangi ambaye anaruka kpwa maua.

examples.dg: Popho anaruka kpwa maua manono.
examples.en: The butterfly is flying among the beautiful flowers.
examples.sw: Kipepeo anaruka kati ya maua mazuri.

senses.definition_dg: Angaliya popho.

examples.dg: Popho-popho ni neno ranjina ra popho.
examples.en: Popho-popho is another word for popho (butterfly).
examples.sw: Popho-popho ni neno lingine la popho (kipepeo).

senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kuonyesa huruma au masikitiko.

examples.dg: Pore sana kpwa msiba wako.
examples.en: I am very sorry for your loss.
examples.sw: Pole sana kwa msiba wako.

senses.definition_dg: Kpwa utulivu, kpwa makini, bila haraka.

examples.dg: Proverb: Simba mwenda pore ndiyemrya nyama
examples.en: The lion who walks quietly is the one who eats the meat
examples.sw: Simba mwenda polepole ndiye anayemla mnyama — methali ya Kidigo.

senses.definition_dg: Kpwa pole-pole, bila haraka.

examples.dg: Nyendeka pore-pore; njira i mbii.
examples.en: Walk slowly; the road is bad.
examples.sw: Tembea polepole; njia ni mbaya.

equivalents_en: young cock about to start crowing

senses.definition_en: young cock about to start crowing
senses.definition_dg: Dzogoo mdide ambaye anaandza kurira kpwa mara ya kpwandza.

examples.dg: Porwa wehu achiandza kurira ligundzu.
examples.en: Our young cock has started crowing in the morning.
examples.sw: Pora wetu ameanza kuwika asubuhi.

equivalents_en: ask a woman's parents for permission to marry her

senses.definition_en: to ask a woman's parents for permission to marry her
senses.definition_dg: Kuphiya kpwa azazi a mwari na kuvoya ruhusa ya kumhala mwanao.

examples.dg: Mulume waphiya kuposa mwari wa jirani.
examples.en: The man went to ask for the neighbour's daughter's hand in marriage.
examples.sw: Mtu alikwenda kuposa binti wa jirani.

senses.definition_dg: Ofisi ya kupelekera na kupokera barua.

examples.dg: Phiya posta upeleke barua.
examples.en: Go to the post office and send the letter.
examples.sw: Nenda posta upeleke barua.

senses.definition_dg: Viputo-viputo vidzere vinaonekana dzulu ya madzi au kinywaji.

examples.dg: Chai ina povu dzulu yakpwe.
examples.en: The tea has foam on top of it.
examples.sw: Chai ina povu juu yake.

equivalents_en: as in ng’ombe or singer). However Digo has some sounds which are not

senses.definition_en: as in ng’ombe or singer). However Digo has some sounds which are not
senses.definition_dg: Maelezo ya kisarufi kuhusu sauti za Chidigo ambazo si za kawaida kpwa Chiswahili.

examples.dg: Chidigo china sauti ambazo haziko kpwa Chiswahili.
examples.en: Digo has some sounds which are not found in Swahili.
examples.sw: Kidigo kina sauti ambazo hazipo katika Kiswahili.

equivalents_en: of Swahili (e.g. ng is pronounced as in ngoma or finger

senses.definition_en: of Swahili (e.g. ng is pronounced as in ngoma or finger, and ng’ is
senses.definition_dg: Maelezo ya namna ya kutamka sauti za Chidigo, hasa tafauti na Chiswahili.

examples.dg: Kutamka kpwa Chidigo ni tafauti na kpwa Chiswahili.
examples.en: Digo pronunciation differs from Swahili.
examples.sw: Matamshi ya Kidigo ni tofauti na ya Kiswahili.

senses.definition_dg: Kutoa hewa kula tumboni kpwa njia ya nyuma bila sauti.

examples.dg: Mutu anapufula ela kagombwa.
examples.en: The person farted silently but it was noticed.
examples.sw: Mtu alishuta bila sauti lakini ilijulikana.

senses.definition_dg: Nguvu za kichawi ambazo mutu anapewa ni mganga.

examples.dg: Ana pufya; usimtsukanye.
examples.en: He has supernatural strength from witchcraft; don't provoke him.
examples.sw: Ana nguvu za kichawi; usimchokoe.

sub_entries.definition_en: to gain artificial strength given through witchcraft
sub_entries.definition_sw: kupata nguvu anazopewa mtu na mganga

senses.definition_dg: Aina ya nyuni ambaye ni dza njiwa.

examples.dg: Puji iye anakala muhini karibu na nyumba.
examples.en: That pigeon stays in the tree near the house.
examples.sw: Pugi yule anakaa mtini karibu na nyumba.

equivalents_en: . Lakini kpwanjina inategemea mahumizi ga hiyo harufu. Wakati wanjina

senses.definition_en: . Lakini kpwanjina inategemea mahumizi ga hiyo harufu. Wakati wanjina
senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kisarufi kuhusu matumizi ya herufi fulani kpwa Chidigo.

examples.dg: Pula ni neno ra kisarufi ra Chidigo.
examples.en: Pula is a Digo grammatical term.
examples.sw: Pula ni neno la kisarufi la Kidigo.

senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kisarufi kuhusu matumizi ya herufi fulani kpwa Chidigo.

examples.dg: Pula ni neno ra kisarufi ra Chidigo.
examples.en: Pula is a Digo grammatical term.
examples.sw: Pula ni neno la kisarufi la Kidigo.

sub_entries.definition_en: to put in a nose stud

examples.dg: Proverb: Dunga pula uunge wajihi
examples.en: Put a stud in your nose so that you make it beautiful (swallow your pride to make a reconciliation)

senses.definition_dg: Phatu ambapo madzi ganatoka ardhini. Chemichemi.

examples.dg: Kuna pula ya madzi masafi phatu phano.
examples.en: There is a spring of clean water at this place.
examples.sw: Kuna chemichemi ya maji safi mahali hapa.

senses.definition_dg: Kumwaga chitu cha majimaji kula kpwenye chombo.

examples.dg: Pula madzi kula kpwenye ndoo.
examples.en: Pour out the water from the bucket.
examples.sw: Mwaga maji kutoka ndooni.

senses.definition_dg: Ugonjwa ambao unajaza madzi sehemu ya siri ya mulume.

examples.dg: Pumbu ni ugonjwa wa mutu arisaye daktari.
examples.en: Hydrocele is a condition that needs a doctor.
examples.sw: Pumbu ni ugonjwa unaohitaji daktari.

senses.definition_en: chronic respiratory diseases, especially asthma and asthmatic bronchitis
senses.definition_dg: Ugonjwa wa kupumua ambawo unasumbua mapafu na kuhenda mutu aheme.

examples.dg: Ana pumu; kanaweza kuzola.
examples.en: He has asthma; he can't run.
examples.sw: Ana pumu; hawezi kukimbia.

equivalents_en: part of a grasshopper or crab that is not eaten
equivalents_sw: sehemu za panzi au kaa (samaki) zisizoliwa

senses.definition_en: part of a grasshopper or crab that is not eaten
senses.definition_sw: sehemu za panzi au kaa (samaki) zisizoliwa
senses.definition_dg: Sehemu ya panzi au kaa ambayo hairiywa.

examples.dg: Usa pumu ya panzi kabla ya kumuocha.
examples.en: Remove the inedible part of the grasshopper before roasting it.
examples.sw: Ondoa sehemu isiyoliwa ya panzi kabla ya kumchoma.

senses.definition_dg: Hewa inayoingizwa na kutolewa mwirini. Kupumua.

examples.dg: Pumuzi zakpwe ni za pole-pole — analala.
examples.en: His breathing is slow — he is sleeping.
examples.sw: Pumzi zake ni za polepole — analala.

senses.definition_dg: Nyama wa kufugwa ambaye anatsukula mizigo na atu.

examples.dg: Punda anatsukula mizigo kure.
examples.en: The donkey carries loads far away.
examples.sw: Punda anabeba mizigo mbali.

equivalents_en: right now (used for the arrival of someone)

senses.definition_en: right now (used for the arrival of someone)
senses.definition_dg: Sambi hivi, muda mfupi tu. Inatumiwa mutu achifika.

examples.dg: Wageni andakpwedza punde-punde.
examples.en: The guests will arrive right now.
examples.sw: Wageni watafika sasa hivi.

equivalents_en: flowers of edible green plants like spinach
equivalents_sw: maua ya mimea yanayotumiwa kama mboga

senses.definition_en: flowers of edible green plants like spinach
senses.definition_sw: maua ya mimea yanayotumiwa kama mboga
senses.definition_dg: Maua ga mimea ya mboga dza mchicha.

examples.dg: Punga za mchicha zikaandza kutoka.
examples.en: The spinach flowers have started to appear.
examples.sw: Maua ya mchicha yameanza kutoka.

senses.definition_dg: Aina ya pepo wa Chiswahili.

examples.dg: Pungahewa ni pepo wa Chiswahili anayesumbua atu.
examples.en: Pungahewa is a Swahili-type spirit that troubles people.
examples.sw: Pungahewa ni pepo wa Kiswahili anayewasumbua watu.

equivalents_en: eagle or other large bird of prey

senses.definition_en: eagle or other large bird of prey
senses.definition_dg: Nyuni mkulu wa kuwinda ambaye anaruka dzulu sana angani.

examples.dg: Pungu anaruka dzulu sana angani.
examples.en: The eagle flies very high in the sky.
examples.sw: Tai anaruka juu sana angani.

senses.definition_dg: Chitu ambacho kina kasoro au hakikamala.

examples.dg: Kazi iyo ni pungufu; ikarekebishwe.
examples.en: That work is defective; it needs to be fixed.
examples.sw: Kazi hiyo ni pungufu; irekebishwe.

senses.definition_dg: Kukosa hewa ya kupumua na kufwa. Kusongorwa.

examples.dg: Mutu iye wahinikwa na purungire.
examples.en: That person was overwhelmed and suffocated.
examples.sw: Mtu yule alikosa hewa na kufa.

senses.definition_dg: Mvula kuisha kunyesha.

examples.dg: Mvula ikapusa, naweza kuphiya
examples.en: It has stopped raining, I can go
examples.sw: Mvua imesimama, ninaweza kwenda.

senses.definition_dg: Madzi ganagomwagika kpwa nguvu na kpwa unji.

examples.dg: Madzi ganamwagika puya-puya
examples.en: The water is overflowing rapidly/gushing out
examples.sw: Maji yanamwagika kwa nguvu kutoka kwenye bomba.

senses.definition_dg: Kukosa kuangaliya au kumjali mutu.

examples.dg: Usipuze maneno ga mzee.
examples.en: Don't ignore the elder's words.
examples.sw: Usipuze maneno ya mzee.

senses.definition_dg: Chitu ambacho hakina thamani au faidha.

examples.dg: Maneno gakpwe ni ga puzi tu.
examples.en: His words are just worthless.
examples.sw: Maneno yake ni ya upuzi tu.

senses.definition_dg: Ukanda wa bahari, ufukwe.

examples.dg: Huphiye kpwa pwa hukaangaliye bahari.
examples.en: Let's go to the shore and look at the sea.
examples.sw: Twende pwani tukaangalie bahari.

senses.definition_dg: Madzi ga bahari kuuya nyuma na ufukwe kutokea.

examples.dg: Phrase: Kuodzala na kupwa
examples.en: To rise and fall (of the tide)
examples.sw: Kujaa na kupwa — msemo wa bahari.

equivalents_en: fit loosely (e.g. clothes or a ring)

senses.definition_en: to fit loosely (e.g. clothes or a ring)
senses.definition_dg: Nguwo au chitu kukala chipana zaidi ya mwiri wa mutu.

examples.dg: Mahu wavwala shati rinapwaya
examples.en: Ali put on a loosely fitting shirt
examples.sw: Mahu alivaa shati linalopwaya.

senses.definition_dg: Nyama wa baharini ariye na mikono minane.

examples.dg: Pweza ni nyama wa baharini ariye mtamu sana.
examples.en: Octopus is a very tasty sea creature.
examples.sw: Pweza ni mnyama wa baharini mtamu sana.

equivalents_en: be seen and disappear within a minute (e.g. shooting stars)

senses.definition_en: to be seen and disappear within a minute (e.g. shooting stars)
senses.definition_dg: Kuonekana na kufika kpwa muda mfupi sana na kutsama, dza nyosi za kupiga.

examples.dg: Nyosi ikalpyia angani na kusaga.
examples.en: A shooting star appeared in the sky and disappeared.
examples.sw: Nyota ilionekana angani na kutoweka.
